## The prompt

<!-- Paste the exact prompt you sent. A debrief depends on the session before it — paste the last turn or two of context too. -->

## What the skill did instead

<!-- Paste the response, or the part that was a summary handed to you rather than a question that made you retrieve. -->

## Where in the loop it slipped

- [ ] Skipped the recall questions entirely and just summarized what we did.
- [ ] Accepted a "makes sense" / "got it" without pushing for a reconstruction.
- [ ] Corrected or explained *before* I'd attempted anything (answer-first instead of question-first).
- [ ] Quizzed trivia ("what did we name it?") instead of the why / the transfer.
- [ ] Other (describe below).

## What you'd have wanted instead

<!-- Optional but very useful. Even a rough version of the question you wish it had asked helps us calibrate. -->

- Claude Code version:
- Skill version (from `metadata.version` in `SKILL.md`):
- Activation: did you invoke it (`/debrief`, "what did we learn"), or did it offer itself?
